attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
     WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT              ,
     'SERVICE_CCW'  DV_MEASURE_NAME,
     WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME                            ,
     WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
     WI.PRODUCT_KEY                      ,
     WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                  ,
     'Cisco' SRC_ENTITY_NAME                              ,
     WI.BK_DEAL_ID                           ,
     WI.ERP_DEAL_ID                           ,
     -1 BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT                 ,
     'Y' SERVICE_FLG                        ,
     WI.RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     WI.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     WI.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     WI.PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
     USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
     USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
     'UNKNOWN' RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,
     WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
     WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
     WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
     WI.XCAT_FLG,
     WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
     WI.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
     WI.ELA_FLG,
     WI.DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     WI.DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
     WI.REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM  OFFER CARVE OUT CHANGE */
     FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_DEFREV_CCW_SRVC_TRNGLTD WI   

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FISCAL_PUB
ON FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT

INNER JOIN 
( SELECT FISCAL_QTR_AGE,MAX(FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13  FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  GROUP BY 1) RF
ON  FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_QTR_AGE -12  = RF.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  

AND   WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  <= RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13

SELECT
     WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT              ,
        'SERVICE_CCW'  DV_MEASURE_NAME,
     WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME                            ,
     WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
     WI.PRODUCT_KEY                      ,
     WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                  ,
     'Cisco' SRC_ENTITY_NAME                              ,
     WI.BK_DEAL_ID                           ,
     WI.ERP_DEAL_ID     ,
     -1 BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT                 ,
     'Y' SERVICE_FLG                        ,
     WI.RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     WI.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     WI.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     WI.PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
     USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
     USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
     'UNKNOWN' RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,
     WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
     WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
     WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
     WI.XCAT_FLG,
     WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
     WI.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
     WI.ELA_FLG,
     WI.DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     0 DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
     WI.REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	 WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM  OFFER CARVE OUT CHANGE */
     FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_DEFREV_CCW_SRVC_NET_TRNGLTD WI     

	 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FISCAL_PUB
ON FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT

INNER JOIN 
( SELECT FISCAL_QTR_AGE,MAX(FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13  FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  GROUP BY 1) RF
ON  FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_QTR_AGE -12  = RF.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  

AND   WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  <= RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13

SELECT
     WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT              ,
     'SERVICE_CCW'  DV_MEASURE_NAME,
     WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME                            ,
     WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                     ,
     WI.PRODUCT_KEY                      ,
     WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                  ,
     'Cisco' SRC_ENTITY_NAME                              ,
     WI.BK_DEAL_ID                           ,
     WI.ERP_DEAL_ID                           ,
     -1 BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT                 ,
     'Y' SERVICE_FLG                        ,
     0 RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     0 BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     0 PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT   ,
     0 PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
     USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
     USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
     'UNKNOWN' RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,
     WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
     WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
     WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
     WI.XCAT_FLG,
     WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
     WI.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
     WI.ELA_FLG,
     0 DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     WI.DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
     0 REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
     WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	 WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM  OFFER CARVE OUT CHANGE */
     FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_DEFREV_CCW_SRVC_BRDG_TRNGLD WI   

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  FISCAL_PUB
ON FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT

INNER JOIN 
( SELECT FISCAL_QTR_AGE,MAX(FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT) FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13  FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  GROUP BY 1) RF
ON  FISCAL_PUB.FISCAL_QTR_AGE -12  = RF.FISCAL_QTR_AGE  

AND   WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  <= RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT13
